summary: Hardening pass: prompt-to-code audit, documentation finalization, static evidence strengthening, package cleanup verification. No application bugs were found requiring code fixes; all issues were documentation gaps addressed by updating delivery-tracker.md, reviewer-notes.md, README.md, and session logs to match the actual delivered code.
requirements_addressed: Prompt-to-code audit: all 30+ business rules verified in code with exact line references
Offline constraint audit: zero external URLs found in 32 frontend files
Package cleanup: zero junk files (.DS_Store, .vscode, node_modules, etc.)
PHP syntax validation: all 121 PHP files pass syntax check
JSON validation: all 4 JSON files parse correctly
Service reference validation: all 42 service methods exist and match controller calls
Documentation: reviewer-notes.md updated with exact file:line evidence pointers
Documentation: delivery-tracker.md updated to reflect all phases complete
Documentation: README.md hardened with manual verification items
Session logs: all 3 sessions contain meaningful delivery summaries
open_risks: No runtime testing was performed -- all verification is static
Composer dependencies not installed (vendor/ not included in delivery)
Frontend Layui shim covers used APIs only, not full Layui feature set

decisions.what: No code bugs were found during hardening; all fixes were documentation-only
decisions.why: PHP syntax is clean, all service references valid, all business rules present in code

decisions.what: Marked all runtime-dependent claims as Manual Verification Required
decisions.why: Honest static delivery cannot claim runtime success without execution

notes: This session was the final hardening pass. The package is ready for static review. All claims in documentation are backed by code that can be inspected at the referenced file paths and line numbers.
